rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Fam. Code §52.015 governs juvenile court directives to apprehend. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter and share no operative overlap.
quote: On the request of a law-enforcement or probation officer, a juvenile court may issue a directive to apprehend a child if the court finds there is probable cause to take the child into custody under the provisions of this title.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed tax exemption change.
